title: Four-Extremity Neurostimulation Using Two Cervical Octapolar Leads and High Frequency of 10 kHz
study_question: Can 10-kHz cervical SCS relieve neuropathic pain in all four extremities without paresthesias?
population_assessed: One 29-year-old man with four-extremity neuropathic pain after cervical injury and fusion
outcome_measures: NRS pain score, dysesthesias, functionality, opioid use, paresthesia presence
inclusion_criteria: Single patient with refractory four-extremity neuropathic pain after cervical injury and surgery
answer_to_study_question: 10-kHz cervical SCS relieved four-extremity pain, improved function, eliminated paresthesias and opioids through 3 months
